Retirement Savings Calculator

Plan your retirement by calculating how much you need to save monthly to reach your retirement goal.

FAQ

How much do I need for retirement?

A common rule is to save 25x your annual expenses. If you spend $50,000/year, aim for $1.25 million in retirement savings.

When should I start saving?

The earlier the better. Starting at 25 vs 35 can mean hundreds of thousands more due to compound interest.

What is the 4% rule?

The 4% rule suggests you can withdraw 4% of your retirement savings annually without running out of money over 30 years.
